Document:
# Advanced Node Scanner
The Advanced Node Scanner is a combination artifact scanner and data analysis device. It is capable of increasing the quality of artifact data, and performing complex interpretations for easy display.
Link the advanced node scanner to an artifact analyzer, then view the additional information on the analyzer's analysis console.
## Features The Advanced Node Scanner provides enhanced information about your artifact for display on the analysis console. This includes: - [bold]Unlock time remaining:[/bold] (R) Display the exact amount of time remaining until the current "unlock session" concludes. - [bold]Triggered node information:[/bold] (R) Nodes that were triggered during the latest (or current) "unlock session" will be highlighted in Gold. Use this information to identify which stimuli to add or remove. - [bold]Reveal hidden nodes:[/bold] (N) One more node layer is revealed for natural artifacts. This allows more informed navigation of the node "tree". - [bold]Force direction:[/bold] (N) The "Down" button forces the next "current node" to be deeper when the artifact activates. The Advanced Node Scanner changes the "Down" button into three more precise buttons: - [italic]L Down:[/italic] Forces the next "current node" to be the node displayed leftmost on the analysis console node diagram. - [italic]R Down:[/italic] Forces the next "current node" to be the node displayed rightmost on the analysis console node diagram. - [italic]? Down:[/italic] Random selection of the next "current node" - same as normal "Down" button.
Key: - (R): Applicable to reticulated artifacts - (N): Applicable to natural artifacts
For both types of artifacts, presence of an Advanced Node Scanner will provide a bonus of 5% more research points.
